channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Mysterious Golden Orb at The Bottom of The Ocean Finally Identified - ScienceAlert
item.description:

  2. Interpretation of Paleocanna tentaculum by Louis-Philippe Bateman (IMAGE)  EurekAlert!
  3. 450-million year old jellyfish ancestor looks like a flailing carwash tubeman  Popular Science
  4. 450‑Million‑Year‑Old Jellyfish Relative Reveals New Species and Clues to Early Evolution  Discover Magazine
  5. Researchers identify new jellyfish species in fossils near Quebec City  McGill University
